QA-10 -001 LOW P3
Failed: Test qa10 arabic text present
🔗 https://dev.mehadedu.com/en 🧪 test_qa10_arabic_text_present 🕐 2026-05-26 04:20:12 ⏱ 8.06s
📋 What this test was checking
Page body must contain Arabic-script characters (U+0600..U+06FF) — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Switch the page language to Arabic (or load /ar)
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Page body must contain Arabic-script characters (U+0600..U+06FF).
✗ What actually happened
Only 0 Arabic chars on /ar — content may not be localized
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
⬇ Download .webm

E   assert 0 >= 50

QA-10 -004 LOW P3
Failed: Test qa10 arabic modal opens
🔗 https://dev.mehadedu.com/en 🧪 test_qa10_arabic_modal_opens 🕐 2026-05-26 04:20:12 ⏱ 15.18s
📋 What this test was checking
Login modal must open on /ar (RTL doesn't break the modal) — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Click the 'Log In' button in the page header
  3. Switch the page language to Arabic (or load /ar)
  4. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Login modal must open on /ar (RTL doesn't break the modal).
✗ What actually happened
The test waited for an element to appear on the page, but it never appeared within 12000ms.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
⬇ Download .webm
    raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None
E   playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Page.wait_for_selector: Timeout 12000ms exceeded.
E   Call log:
E     - waiting for locator("[role=\"dialog\"], [aria-modal=\"true\"], [class*=\"modal-content\"]") to be visible
